title: Dominion Energy Donates $1.3 Million to Environmental Non-Profits
text: Environmental grants awarded to 97 organizations across 8 states More than $400,000 donated to 35 organizations in Virginia Grants focus on environmental education and stewardship initiatives RICHMOND, Va. , Jan. 31, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The Dominion Energy Charitable Foundation has awarded $1.3 million in grant funding to 97 environmental organizations across eight states, including more than $400,000 to 35 organizations in Virginia.

title: 7 Sorry Dividend Stocks to Sell in February Before It's Too Late
text: When it comes to dividend stocks, the consensus is that the higher the yield, the better. High dividend yields can often be an indication that something is wrong.

title: 7 Blue-Chip Stocks to Buy as a New Bull Market Emerges
text: Buying blue-chip stocks is generally a smart decision. They tend to be established, profitable, name-brand companies marked by reliable growth.

title: 7 Utility Stocks That Will Be Big Winners in 2023
text: When faced with economic uncertainty, investors should turn their attention to utility stocks to buy. Hardly an exciting arena, these critical service providers literally keep societies running.

title: Switching Horses On Valuation: Southern Company Vs. Dominion Energy
text: Sometimes two good companies in the same investment sector find their respective share prices diverge for what appears to be no good reason. I uncovered what appears to be such an instance in regulated utilities Southern Company and Dominion Energy.
